pdfExportMechanism: exportReportToPDF(report, options) in utils/math-report-generator.js. Default options.method is "print" → window.print() (no file download). With method "canvas", dynamic import of html2pdf.js/dist/html2pdf.js then html2pdf().set(opt).from(el).save() (jsPDF inside html2pdf options).
buttonSelectorsFound: pages/learning/parent-report.js — button with visible label containing ייצא ל-PDF
QA file mode: query ?qa_pdf=file so click passes { method: "canvas" } (html2pdf path)
canTestDownloadWithPlaywright: Yes when navigating to /learning/parent-report?qa_pdf=file with seeded aggregate storage + mocked /api/student/me; canvas path emits a browser download.
blockingIssues: Without ?qa_pdf=file, default UI uses print dialog — not capturable as Playwright download.
recommendedMinimalGate: Playwright: open parent-report with ?qa_pdf=file, seed storage, click export, assert download + %PDF header + min size.
recommendedFutureImprovement: Optional dedicated /api PDF route if product moves generation server-side; keep client path tested via canvas.
